name: generation-time trace records every PR consulted during a generation event with its pr_number
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"event":"generation","commit":"abc123","consulted_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a"},{"number":2,"org":"b"}]}\n' > event.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event event.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"number":1' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && grep -q '"number":2' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
